title: (Bullish Signal) AVDL entered Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on May 11, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that AVDL's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 66 similar cases where AVDL's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 58 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 88%. Current price $8.47 crossed the support line at $8.15 and is trading between $8.95 support and $8.15 support lines. Throughout the month of 04/09/21 - 05/11/21, the price experienced a -6% Downtrend, while the week of 05/04/21 - 05/11/21 shows a +11% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/5igp4xdhtpy61.png?width=1527&format=png&auto=webp&s=87ec94f0ea1ad6e85382731b0931fe83389f373f

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on May 11, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on AVDL as a result. Tickeron A.I. detecetd that in 58 of 66 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 88%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for AVDL just turned positive on May 10, 2021. Looking at past instances where AVDL's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 37 of 46 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 80%.

Following a +6.66% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where AVDL advanced for three days, in 188 of 233 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

AVDL may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.
